info.name: Sentiment Analyzer — Complete API (with examples)
info.description: Every backend endpoint (~95) with an example request and a saved example response. Set the `base_url` variable (default http://localhost:3000), `api_key` for x-api-key endpoints, and `admin_password` for /api/admin/config. Generated 2026-06-29.

request.description: Top coins with sentiment. Params: limit, sort_by.

response.name: List top coins — 200 OK
response.body: {"count": 2, "coins": [{"symbol": "BTC", "name": "Bitcoin", "price_usd": 65000, "price_change_24h_percent": 2.5, "market_cap_usd": 1300000000000.0, "market_rank": 1, "sentiment": {"label": "BULL", "score": 0.72, "summary": "Strong momentum and positive news flow."}}, {"symbol": "ETH", "name": "Ethereum", "price_usd": 3200, "price_change_24h_percent": 1.1, "market_cap_usd": 380000000000.0, "market_rank": 2, "sentiment": {"label": "NEUTRAL", "score": 0.51, "summary": "Mixed signals."}}]}

request.description: Detail view — price history, headlines, scored items, source breakdown, sentiment.
Run BASIC / ADVANCED / TRADING_SIGNALS / SMART analysis.
Cached sentiment object including scored_items, source_breakdown, collection_stats.
Force re-analysis. Requires x-api-key header.
Service status — reports misconfigured if API keys are missing.
Documentation — modes, agent types, risk profiles.
Documentation for modes, agent configs, order book, and learning persistence.
Scrape one symbol from social sources and ingest into the trending engine.
Batch scrape up to 20 symbols from social sources.
Ranked trending topics from ingested social posts.
Manually ingest scraped posts into the trending engine.
Start tournament (fire-and-forget). Returns 202 + competitionId.
Poll progress, top performer, and status.
Full results — rankings, H2H, equity curve, market impact.
Per-agent equity curves for a competition.
Server-Sent Events stream of live competition progress.
Full trade log for a competition.
List all competitions (in-memory).
N-round head-to-head comparison between two agents.
Compute per-agent coin selections from CoinGecko live data.
List all persisted agent learning states.
Reset agent learning state. Requires x-api-key.
Pre-train on synthetic-market episodes; returns a convergence curve.
Set/override an agent's learning algorithm (Q_TABLE / POLICY_GRADIENT / DQN).
Best evolved genome across persisted tournaments.
Evolutionary tournament history.
Current evolved population snapshot.

item.name: Broker & Real Trading
item.description: Encrypted broker credentials and order control. All require x-api-key.

request.description: Unauthenticated — id, label, provider, mode for UI dropdowns.
List stored credential metadata — no secrets.
Store encrypted broker credentials (AES-256-GCM).
Remove stored credential and disconnect adapter.
Decrypt and connect a broker adapter into the in-process registry.
List currently connected adapters.
Order audit trail for a competition.
Cancel all open orders for a competition.
Start a multi-generation evolutionary tournament. Returns 202 + tournamentId.
List all tournaments (lightweight).
Full tournament status + generation history.
Dashboard summary of recent tournaments and latest generation fitness timeline.
Population snapshot + per-agent fitness for one generation.
Roll a tournament back to a prior generation checkpoint.
Breed two parent agents into a mutated offspring.
List active agents (paginated).
Top agents by win rate.
Single agent with stats.
Update agent cosmetics (name, emoji, color, bio).
Retire an agent (cull from the active pool).
Competition history for an agent.
Agent genome (evolutionary parameters).
Ancestry chain.
Clustered trending topics. Params: timeWindow, limit, type.
Paginated scored social items.
Single item with scoring_breakdown and signal weights.
Source health counters and item totals.
Multi-source MultiSourceTrendReport. Params: interval.
Fire-and-forget scrape. Returns 202.

item.name: Trading Service
item.description: Paper / sandbox / live exchange wrapper with safety guards.

request.description: Exchange name and connection status.
Current price for a symbol.
All non-zero balances from the exchange.
Place an order through TradingService safety guards.
Capital, PnL, trade counts, and max loss threshold.

item.name: Backtesting
item.description: Configure agents and run historical backtests.

request.description: Register trading agents (RULE_BASED / ML_BASED / HYBRID).
Run day-by-day backtest over CoinGecko historical data.
Retrieve full backtest report with equity curves.
Coins ranked by SMART composite score.

item.name: Live Agent Orchestrator & MARL Policy Feeder

request.description: Current live decision-policy params + exchange mode.
Run one decision cycle -> OrchestrationReport.
Recommended policy params mapped from the best evolved genome + provenance.
Apply the MARL-fed params to the live orchestrator.

item.name: Shadow Harness
item.description: Phase 4 continuous runner + Phase 6 SSE feed.

request.description: Harness state plus recent cycle summaries (newest first).
Start the continuous loop.
Stop the loop.
Run a single cycle now -> OrchestrationReport.
SSE feed: initial status event, then one cycle event per completed cycle.
Roll IS/OOS windows. Accepts bars[] or prices[].

item.name: Paper Analytics (Net-of-Fees Expectancy)
item.description: Reads the shared exchange order history.

request.description: ExpectancyReport.
Most recent reconstructed closed trades.
Write report + closed trades to a timestamped JSON file under <cwd>/data.
List all tournaments.
List currently running tournaments.
Single tournament detail.
SSE feed of tournament progress.
Pause a running tournament.
Resume a paused tournament.
Stop a tournament.
Create a cron-scheduled tournament.
List schedules.
Single schedule.
Update a schedule.
Delete a schedule.
Trigger a scheduled tournament immediately.
Read runtime app_config values.
Set a runtime config value.
Remove a runtime config value (reverts to .env/default).
